description_long: This is a weathered, industrial-style vending machine with a robust, rectangular metal body and a distressed blue and brown finish. The front features a glass display window showcasing multiple rows of cylindrical products, with a product retrieval slot below. To the right of the display are several vertically aligned selection buttons, and above the window is a small area that may serve as a display or instruction panel. The sides of the machine are adorned with engraved or embossed text and symbols, including 'CT UTILITY' and a stylized bird motif, as well as warning labels and government property markings. The top and base are reinforced with metallic trim, and the overall design suggests durability for outdoor or high-traffic urban environments. The machine's utilitarian appearance is complemented by visible signs of rust and wear, indicating long-term exposure to the elements.
description: A rugged, metal vending machine with a glass product window, selection buttons, and prominent engraved signage, finished in distressed blue and brown tones.
description_view_0: Side view showing 'CT UTILITY' text and a large engraved emblem, with visible rust and weathering.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a plain, rusted metal surface with warning labels and a vented panel at the bottom.
description_view_2: Opposite side view featuring 'PROPERTY OF THE US GOVERNMENT' text engraved near the base, with a mostly unadorned, weathered surface.
description_view_3: Front view revealing the glass product display, selection buttons, retrieval slot, and vertical signage with bird motifs and stylized text.
attribute_display_panel: A small rectangular display panel is located above the product selection buttons on the front, appearing as a darkened or possibly illuminated area.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A vertical row of individual buttons is present to the right of the product display window, each labeled with white text.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A wide, rectangular open slot is located below the product display window on the front of the machine.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Engraved or embossed text such as 'CT UTILITY' and 'PROPERTY OF THE US GOVERNMENT' appears on the sides, with stylized bird motifs and vertical white text on the front right panel; yellow warning labels are visible on the rear.
